narrative:
North Olmsted-01-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,173 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.2%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.6 percentage points.
